name: Movie Generator
description:
So basically it’s a Generator for movies or Shows

____________________________________

MovieGen will tell you a Movie about anything you want involving any Actors, Celebrities or Any other Characters you can think of, regardless of the content in excruciating details. Give her a good descriptive prompt about any scenario and she’ll give you a long detailed story.

____________________________________

IMPORTANT: Change token limit to set story length. 0 is recommended. If it stops in the middle of a Movie then tell her how the Movie continues
creator: Kenenenr
